svg.title: Mobile shell — Inbox and open wave (390×844, side-by-side)
svg.desc: Two mobile frames at 390×844 each. Left: Inbox folder list collapsed into a sticky top bar plus filter chip strip and a vertical list of digest cards. Right: open wave with back-to-inbox affordance, wave header, threaded reading, mobile compose dock at the bottom.

g.text: Sasha: I bumped the retry budget but we still see
backoff after five consecutive 502s on prod-2.
Dan: design memo updated with the index-stamp invariant.
Tasks rolled forward. Two carryovers from F-3.
p75 INP +18% on j2cl-root since Tuesday.
